positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene silhouette against a bright gradient sunset sky. The main subject is a grouping of fantastical flora: large, abstract glowing mushrooms, delicate curved branches, and oversized monstera-like leaves, all rendered in a clean, highly contrasting deep indigo and emerald green palette. The composition should be central and visually balanced, ideal for a repeating seamless pattern or single-use apparel print. Style must be graphic, clean vector art with minimal shading, evoking Art Deco meets nature illustration. Perfect contrast for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic lighting, clean lines, high detail, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, photography, photorealistic, messy, grunge, cluttered, asymmetrical
